notes: Scribe MCP server (not our pipeline). 51 rules: Java (21), properties (10), Maven XML (11), Gradle (4), YAML (3), spring.factories (2). No kantra tests — Scribe has no test loop. Quality 5.75 from consistent structured messages (all rules have ## heading, ### Before/After/Additional Info, links, effort). Only 2 precision issues: @Nullable detection too broad (fires on all Spring null-safety usage), Spring Retry wildcard import. Gradle/YAML parity gap — 4 Gradle rules vs 11 Maven, 3 YAML rules vs 10 properties. Covers Jackson 3, testing (@MockBean/@SpyBean), core (BootstrapRegistry, EnvironmentPostProcessor), messaging (Kafka, RabbitMQ), data (Elasticsearch, MongoDB, EntityScan), and dependency renames.
